overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from The Witcher 3 showing Geralt of Rivia walking through a sunlit medieval fantasy town (Toussaint) with colorful Mediterranean-style stone buildings. The character emerges from narrow alleys into a bustling waterfront market, then ascends through a series of stone archways toward a hilltop castle, all bathed in golden hour lighting.

scene_state.functional_zone: narrow village courtyard with stone walls

events.description: exits narrow stone passage into open market square

agents.ego_description: walking through a narrow stone courtyard and emerging into a sunlit market square

notable_agents.action: dog lying on the cobblestones near a doorway

entered.detail: weathered stone walls with rough texture flanking the narrow passage
large orange terracotta pot with purple flowers
dark wooden door with iron hinges at the end of the courtyard
rustic wooden tables and stalls visible ahead in the square

segments.scene_description: The segment begins in a narrow stone courtyard with weathered walls and terracotta planters. The character walks forward, passing a sleeping dog, and emerges into a sunlit market square with wooden stalls and barrels.

scene_state.functional_zone: waterfront market square with docked ship

events.description: approaches waterfront revealing harbor and docked sailing ship
character slows and stops briefly at waterfront railing to observe

agents.ego_description: walking through the market toward the waterfront, observing the docked ship and harbor view

notable_agents.action: villager sitting at a wooden table near the waterfront

entered.detail: large wooden galleon with furled sails docked at the wharf
calm blue water of the harbor reflecting the afternoon sun
rustic wooden picnic tables and benches arranged in the square
stacked wooden barrels serving as market decoration

segments.scene_description: The character walks through an open market square filled with wooden tables and barrels, approaching a waterfront with a view of a docked sailing ship. Villagers sit at tables enjoying the harbor view as the character stops briefly at the railing.

scene_state.functional_zone: narrow ascending alley with stone stairs and archways

events.description: turns away from waterfront and begins ascending stone stairs
enters covered stone archway between closely packed buildings

agents.ego_description: turning back from the waterfront and climbing stone stairs through narrow village alleys

entered.detail: weathered stone steps ascending between tightly packed buildings
arched stone passageway connecting buildings overhead
building with distinctive red plaster facade and wooden shutters
large terracotta pot containing an olive tree

segments.scene_description: The character turns away from the waterfront and ascends through a narrow alley with stone stairs and archways. The passage is flanked by buildings with red plaster walls and potted olive trees, creating a shaded, enclosed environment.

scene_state.functional_zone: village square with central tree and merchant cart

events.description: emerges from stone archway into open village square with large tree
continues walking past wooden merchant cart toward main street

agents.ego_description: walking through the village square past a wooden cart and scattered villagers

notable_agents.action: villager sitting on a bench near a wooden merchant cart

entered.detail: open cobblestone square with scattered trees and benches
mature olive tree providing shade in the center of the square
wooden wagon with canvas cover parked near the square edge
vibrant blue and yellow painted stone houses with red tile roofs

segments.scene_description: Emerging from the narrow archway, the character enters a sunlit village square dominated by a large olive tree and a wooden merchant cart. Colorful houses with blue and yellow facades line the square as the character walks toward the main street.

scene_state.functional_zone: ascending main street with multiple stone archways leading to castle

events.description: enters first of multiple stone archways on the ascending main street
passes through archway into brighter sunlight with view of distant castle

agents.ego_description: walking up the main cobblestone street through a series of stone archways toward the castle on the hill

notable_agents.action: villager walking down the street toward the camera

entered.detail: series of tall stone archways spanning the cobblestone street
medieval castle towers visible atop the hill in the distance
high stone walls supporting the terraced buildings above

segments.scene_description: The character ascends the main cobblestone street through a series of imposing stone archways. The street climbs steadily toward a distant castle visible on the hilltop, flanked by colorful medieval houses and stone retaining walls. Villagers walk in the opposite direction as the character progresses upward through the alternating light and shadow of the archways.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a Mediterranean-style town that transitions from narrow courtyards to a bustling waterfront and finally ascends toward a hilltop castle. It begins in a weathered stone courtyard with terracotta planters, moving past a sleeping dog before emerging into a sunlit market square filled with wooden stalls and barrels. As the character reaches the waterfront, the scene opens up to reveal a docked sailing ship and villagers relaxing by the harbor, before the camera turns away to ascend through a shaded alley of red plaster walls and potted olive trees. The environment then expands into a bright village square dominated by a large olive tree and colorful blue and yellow facades, leading the character toward the main cobblestone street. Finally, the path climbs steadily through a series of imposing stone archways, alternating between light and shadow as the character progresses upward toward the distant castle on the hilltop.
